title: HideHitbox
description: HideHitbox is a lightweight Minecraft Forge client mod that automatically hides entity hitboxes (the F3+B debug feature) every tick. Perfect for players who want a cleaner view without accidentally showing hitboxes.
body:
# HideHitbox

**HideHitbox** is a lightweight Minecraft Forge client mod that automatically hides entity hitboxes (the F3+B debug feature) every tick. Perfect for players who want a cleaner view without accidentally showing hitboxes.

## Features
- Automatically hides hitboxes every tick.
- Client-side only; does not affect servers.
- No configuration or keybinds required.
- Lightweight and simple.

## Installation
1. Install the correct version of [Minecraft Forge](https://files.minecraftforge.net/) for your Minecraft version.
2. Download the latest `HideHitbox.jar` from the releases.
3. Place the `.jar` file into your `mods` folder.
4. Launch Minecraft with the Forge profile.

## Usage
- The mod works automatically; no manual activation is required.
- Hitboxes will remain hidden throughout gameplay.

## Notes
- This is a **client-side mod only**. No server installation is necessary.
- The mod ensures that pressing F3+B will not reveal hitboxes.
